g.text: Strain systems generally always produce a prediction, so they sit on the

text.style: fill: #64748b; font: 9.5px 'Helvetica Neue', 'Helvetica', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans'

g.text: diagonal (precision = recall = accuracy). text2term abstains ~25 % at its

text.style: fill: #64748b; font: 9.5px 'Helvetica Neue', 'Helvetica', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans'

g.text: threshold, lifting its precision above the diagonal at low recall.

text.style: fill: #64748b; font: 9.5px 'Helvetica Neue', 'Helvetica', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans'

g.text: Dashed line: precision = recall reference. n=500 throughout.
